summary: End-to-end frontend testing of TradinX Next.js app (Tactical Swiss Terminal redesign). All critical flows pass: landing page, login, signup, guest login, dashboard (KPIs, equity chart, account switcher, broker modal, recent fills, by-symbol), analytics (donut, R-distribution, session heatmap, dd-card), chart replay (trade list 78 rows, candle chart, journal panel with emotions and editable note), trade log (78 rows, filter-long->34, filter-win->52, deals tab 25 rows), and sidebar navigation. Mock /data/* APIs verified end-to-end (accounts returns 2, stats returns 79 equity points with netPnl 11174.75, winRate 66.7%, PF 3.13). Design verified: body bg #0A0A0A, body font 'JetBrains Mono' (Cabinet Grotesk on headings), profit-green/loss-red usage — no Inter/purple-on-white slop.

ui_bugs.issue: React warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' — sessions.map renders <> Fragment without key. Replace fragment with <React.Fragment key={s}> to silence warning.
One asset returned 403 on /analytics page load (no functional impact observed); likely a static asset or external font. Worth confirming in network panel.

integration_issues.flow: Chart Replay — clicking another trade row to update chart title
integration_issues.issue: Clicking trade-row[1] did not change the candle-chart inner text length (68 chars before == 68 chars after). The chart container DOM may not re-render visible symbol/title text on row change, or it only changes a nested element. Manual verification recommended; consider exposing the active symbol via a data-testid (e.g., candle-chart-symbol) so the change is testable.

issues: After Connect Broker submit, the new (3rd) account becomes active and KPI cards/cards fade to a dim/empty state (no trades yet for new account). This is correct data behaviour but the UI gives no explicit 'No data yet — sync MT5 to populate' empty-state message; consider adding one for clarity.

action_items: Add `key` prop to SessionGrid fragment in /app/apps/web/src/app/analytics/page.tsx (~line 102) to clear React warning.
Investigate the 403 resource on /analytics page (network tab) — likely a static asset reference.
(Optional) Surface the active chart symbol via a dedicated data-testid (e.g., data-testid=candle-chart-symbol) so trade-row click can be programmatically asserted.
(Optional) Add an empty-state UI for newly connected MT5 accounts with no trades on the Dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: Mock route `/data/trades/stats` returns proper shape with all 21 keys and 79 equity points — good.
Landing page hero uses Cabinet Grotesk + JetBrains Mono with #0A0A0A background — matches Tactical Swiss Terminal design spec.
Connect-broker-modal submission optimistically adds account to switcher (2 -> 3 tabs) — verified working with mocked POST /data/accounts.
Trade filters compose correctly (filter-long isolates 34 long trades; filter-win isolates 52 winning trades out of 78).

success_rate.frontend: ~96% (all 10 review items pass; 1 minor React key warning + 1 untestable chart symbol change)

test_credentials: Mocked: any email/password on /login routes to /dashboard. Guest button (data-testid=login-guest) also lands on /dashboard.
seed_data_creation: None — used seeded mock data from /app/apps/web/src/lib/mock-data.ts (2 accounts: acc-xm-345636702 with 78 trades, acc-icmarkets-441288 with 42 trades).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend runs under supervisor via /app/frontend/package.json -> cd /app/apps/web && yarn dev. Backend FastAPI is intentionally FATAL/not used — all data is served by Next.js API route handlers under /data/* (NOT /api/*). Use public URL https://1a9076db-e0c1-422d-a6e1-b20fc8ae6752.preview.emergentagent.com . All key elements have data-testid; selectors verified working: landing-page, hero-cta-launch, nav-signin, login-page, login-form, login-guest, signup-page, signup-form, dashboard-page, kpi-{winrate,pf,dd,bscore}, equity-card, equity-chart, account-switcher, account-tab-{345636702,441288}, header-add-broker, connect-broker-modal, broker-{mt5-login,investor-password,server}, bysymbol-card, analytics-page, winloss-donut, r-distribution, session-heatmap, dd-card, chart-replay-page, trade-list, trade-row-<id>, candle-chart, journal-panel, journal-note, emotion-disciplined, emotion-fomo, trades-page, trades-table, filter-{long,short,win,loss}, tab-deals, deals-table, sidebar, nav-{dashboard,analytics,chart-replay,trade-log}.
rca of the issue: No critical bugs found. Two minor observations: (1) React unique-key warning in SessionGrid fragment, RCA: <> fragment used inside .map without key — fix by switching to keyed React.Fragment. (2) Chart Replay trade-row click impact not externally observable via candle-chart text length — RCA: chart re-renders but text container length is constant; recommend dedicated data-testid for the active symbol label.
